# Skin Temperature Golden Vectors

These vectors characterize temperature-measurement-period to public skin-temperature result mapping under shared ownership. Android currently exposes `sourceDeviceId` as `deviceId` while iOS public `PolarSkinTemperatureResult` does not, so vectors use platform expectations for that difference. `SkinTemperatureDomainCommonPolicyTest.kt` provides executable shared common policy coverage for sample preservation, source-device ownership, unresolved null-vs-UNKNOWN enum decisions, and `skin-temperature-domain-readiness.json` behavior-family coverage for source-device ownership, empty sample-list preservation, sample delta/temperature preservation, measurement/sensor-location mapping, unknown measurement and sensor-location boundaries, platform skin-temperature vector references, and the `compile-verification-gate` before public model mapping moves to shared.
